{"action": "write_file", "name": "professional-portfolio", "file_path": "references/mystic-purple-theme.md", "file_content": "# Mystic Purple Theme Reference

A dark, ethereal, cosmic purple palette for portfolio sites. Deep near-black background with vibrant purple accents.

## Color Palette

| Token       | Hex       | Usage                   |
|-------------|-----------|-------------------------|
| mystic-50   | #f5f0ff   | Lightest accent         |
| mystic-100  | #ede5ff   | Light accent            |
| mystic-200  | #dccfff   | Muted light             |
| mystic-300  | #c4adff   | Mid accent text         |
| mystic-400  | #a880ff   | Secondary accent        |
| mystic-500  | #8b5cf6   | Primary accent (vibrant)|
| mystic-600  | #7c3aed   | Primary dark            |
| mystic-700  | #6d28d9   | Dark border             |
| mystic-800  | #5b21b6   | Dark cards              |
| mystic-900  | #4c1d95   | Darkest cards           |
| mystic-950  | #2e1065   | Near-black              |

## Background

```
body { background: #0f0a1a; }
```

Clean dark base, no gradient needed — the glass cards and orbs provide depth.

## Glass Card (final — v3 after redesigns)

```css
/* Applied inline to avoid class conflicts */
style={{
  background: 'rgba(30, 15, 60, 0.4)',
  border: '1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.12)',
}}
rounded-2xl p-5 or px-5 py-4
transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
```

Note: v1 used `.glass-card` class with `rounded-16px`. Final uses inline `rounded-2xl` with lighter opacity background and thinner border. More modern.

## Typography (merged final — from Oz + Nexa patterns)

```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

:root {
  --font-heading: "Playfair Display", serif;
  --font-body: "Inter", sans-serif;
}
```

- Headings (H1, H2, stat numbers, section titles): `style={{fontFamily:'var(--font-heading)'}}`
- Body: Inter via `body { font-family: var(--font-body); }`
- Nav brand: Playfair Display
- All other text: Inter

## CTA Buttons (final — Nexa pattern)

```jsx
// Primary
className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-mystic-600 px-8 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition-all hover:bg-mystic-500 shadow-lg shadow-mystic-600/25"

// Secondary
className="inline-flex h-11 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-mystic-700/50 px-8 text-sm font-semibold text-mystic-300 transition-all hover:border-mystic-500 hover:text-white"
```

Key differences from v1/v2: `rounded-lg` not `rounded-full`, `h-11` explicit height, `shadow-lg`, `text-sm` not `text-base`.

## Nav (final — Oz/Nexa pattern)

```
fixed top-0 z-50 border-b border-mystic-800/30 backdrop-blur-md
background: rgba(15, 10, 26, 0.92)
nav links: rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-mystic-900/40 transition-all
```

## Section divider (final)

```
border-t border-mystic-800/20
```
Use instead of heavy gradient separators between sections.

## Section padding

```
py-20 md:py-28 px-6
```
Consistent across all sections.

## Skill bar (final)

```css
.h-1.5 rounded-full overflow-hidden
background: rgba(139,92,246,0.15) // track
gradient: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #a880ff) // fill
animation: skillFill 1s ease-out forwards (from width: 0)
```

## Timeline (final)

```
Active dot:  w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-mystic-500 border-2 border-mystic-950 shadow-lg shadow-mystic-500/30
Inactive dot: bg-mystic-800 border-mystic-950
Line:        w-px bg-gradient-to-b from-mystic-500/40 via-mystic-500/10 to-transparent
Card:        same glass inline style + hover:-translate-y-0.5
```

## Unification Checklist

After applying the palette, verify NO old colors remain:

```bash
# Check for any non-mystic tailwind purple colors
grep -n 'from-purple\|from-violet\|from-fuchsia\|from-indigo\|from-pink' app/page.tsx

# Check for old rgba references
grep -n 'rgba(139' app/globals.css app/page.tsx

# Ensure no color misses
grep -n 'rgba(142\|rgba(30\|rgba(139' app/page.tsx app/globals.css

# All hex colors should match the palette above
grep -oP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}' app/globals.css app/page.tsx | sort -u
```
